item.title: About
item.description: Hello, you’ve found your way to my blog somehow or another. Glad to have yah. I’m a Senior Engineer at HashiCorp, working remotely from Atlanta, GA as an embedded Release Engineer on the Terraform Enterprise product. I write Go and PHP proficiently and I write Ruby, Bash, Java, and Javascript competently. But, like so many of us, I spend a lot of my time staring at YAML now instead. I like solving problems, especially ones I didn’t think I knew how to solve.
